creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Vitaly,
I know we put RC4 out there for security updates but 4.10.0 release is out now.  If you would like to sanity check the attached patch I can go ahead and commit this.

Log:
https://people.freebsd.org/~junovitch/poudriere/PR203450/chicken-4.10.0,1.log

Also tested in Poudriere on:
9.3-RELEASE-p26      amd64
9.3-RELEASE-p26      i386
10.1-RELEASE-p20     amd64
10.1-RELEASE-p20     i386
10.2-RELEASE-p3      amd64
10.2-RELEASE-p3      i386
11.0-CURRENT r287698 amd64
11.0-CURRENT r287698 arm.armv6
11.0-CURRENT r287698 i386
